first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the textual differences between the two evaluations are minor rephrasings and shifts in focus that fall within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation. For example, the concerns are slightly reworded and re-prioritized, but they still point to the same general gaps in experience relative to the job description. There is no language in the variant evaluation that suggests the change in location from Berlin to Bangalore influenced the assessment.
